bench_setup.notes: RNG self-test. Enables HSI48 (48 MHz, RNG default kernel clock via RNGSEL=000), enables RNG1 (AHB2, 0x48060800), reads 4×32-bit random words. Verifies DRDY, no SEIS/CEIS, not all four words identical. On PASS: detail0=first random word. On FAIL: 0xE001=HSI48 timeout, 0xE002=DRDY timeout, 0xE003=SEIS (seed error), 0xE004=CEIS (clock error), 0xE005=all words identical. No loopback wiring required.
